versions.version_description: This version isn't in the right key, because it's for beginners. When I started playing guitar, G was the easiest key to play in.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Capo on 2nd


[Intro]

[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em/B[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
I need another story [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Something to get off my chest [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
My life gets kinda boring [/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]
Need something that I can confess [/tab]

[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
Til' all my sleeves are stained red [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em/B[/ch]
From all the truth that I've said [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Come by it honestly I swear [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]
Thought you saw a wink, no [/tab]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]                  
I've been on the brink, so [/tab]


[Chorus]
        
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Tell me what you want to hear[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Something that will light those ears [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Sick of all the insincere [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]      
So I'm gonna give all my secrets away [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Em/B[/ch]
  This time, don't need another perfect lie[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Am[/ch] 
Don't care if critics ever jump in line [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]      
I'm gonna give all my secrets away [/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Em/B[/ch]
  My god, amazing how we got this far [/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch] 
It's like we're chasing all those stars [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Who's driving shiny big black cars [/tab]
            
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
And everyday I see the news [/tab]
                         
All the problems that we could solve 
[tab]             [ch]Em/B[/ch]
And when a situation rises [/tab]
                       
Just write it into an album 
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
Send it straight to gold[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
I don't really like my flow, no, so [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Tell me what you want to hear[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Something that will light those ears [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Sick of all the insincere [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]      
So I'm gonna give all my secrets away [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Em/B[/ch]
  This time, don't need another perfect lie[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Am[/ch] 
Don't care if critics ever jump in line [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]      
I'm gonna give all my secrets away [/tab]


[Instrumental]

[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em/B[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]


[Bridge]

[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Oooh, got no reason, got not shame [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
Got no family I can blame [/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]
Just don't let me disappear [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                  
I'mma tell you everything [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Tell me what you want to hear [/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Something that will light those ears[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Sick of all the insincere [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]      
So I'm gonna give all my secrets away [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Em/B[/ch]
  This time, don't need another perfect lie[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Am[/ch] 
Don't care if critics ever jump in line [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]      
I'm gonna give all my secrets away [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]    
All my secrets away, All my secrets away.[/tab]
